title: Cloud-based storage management of a remote storage system
abstract: Secure cloud-based storage system management that includes: extending a cloud-based storage management session by using cloud-based user credentials to securely manage a remote storage system, and executing, on the remote storage system, data storage operations generated from commands issued via the cloud-based storage management session.
claims: 1. A method comprising: extending a cloud-based storage management session by using cloud-based user credentials to securely manage a remote storage system; and executing, on the remote storage system, data storage operations generated from commands issued via the cloud-based storage management session, wherein the cloud-based storage management session maintains a workflow state while the data storage operations are implemented by one or more agents on the remote storage system in a stateless manner.
